hero.description: Nefertiti redefines the female health experience. Away from cold, robotic metrics, we propose an aesthetic and scientific ritual of hormonal tracking, integrative nutrition, and holistic well-being.
hero.badgeText: High-fidelity platform designed exclusively for cyclical female biology.

cardFase.nutritionDesc: Your energy is ascending with rising estrogen. Focus on light foods that stimulate digestion and provide essential micronutrients.

ritmo.title: A refined look at every moment of your cycle.

item1.title: Conscious Biological Monitoring
item1.desc: No gray flowcharts or complex spreadsheets. Our interface translates your temperature, mood, and hormonal data into an elegant visual narrative, offering insights that naturally adapt to your real daily routine.
item1.visualDesc: Your estrogen and progesterone act like tides. We help you understand the cognitive and physical shifts of every wave.

item2.title: Nutrition Tuned with Metabolism
item2.desc: Your basal metabolic rate changes throughout the month. Nefertiti guides your functional nutrition week by week, recommending dishes and superfoods that work in harmony with your hormones, instead of imposing generic restrictive diets.
item2.visualDesc: Precisely suggested foods to support metabolic peaks of the luteal phase or replenish iron during menstruation.

item3.title: Digital Boutique Clinic
item3.desc: We connect you to an elite medical team — integrative gynecologists, endocrinologists, and therapists focused on female well-being. With teleconsultations and medical records synchronized with your daily logs, care becomes seamless and intimate.
item3.visualDesc: Your partner physicians have access to your symptom and nutrition diary, eliminating repetitive conversations and delivering precise diagnostics.

manifesto.quote: We believe that technology should embrace the nature of the female body, creating digital healing spaces that inspire beauty, calm, and self-knowledge.

seguranca.title: Encrypted records, non-negotiable privacy.
seguranca.description: Unlike traditional cycle apps that monetize personal data, Nefertiti is structured on the highest standards of international medical compliance. Your symptom and consultation data are protected by Firebase Authentication and encrypted directly in Cloud Firestore.
seguranca.warning: No health data is shared with third parties or used for marketing purposes. Your hormonal sovereignty is protected.
seguranca.item1: TLS encryption in transit and AES-256 at rest.
seguranca.item2: SSR validation with Firebase Admin session tokens.
seguranca.item3: Compliant with international HIPAA and LGPD regulations.

cta.description: Create your initial access and experience the serenity of an ecosystem designed for your hormonal well-being.

perfil.title: Your Personal Sanctuary
perfil.subtitle: Manage your data and privacy settings with end-to-end encryption.
perfil.name: Name
perfil.shareMedical: Share data with my partner doctors
perfil.shareMedicalDesc: Allows doctors within the ecosystem to view your clinical dashboard in real time.
perfil.anonymousAnalyticsDesc: Helps improve the cycle detection algorithm without exposing your identity.
perfil.mfaDesc: Additional protection for your electronic medical record.

social.subtitle: Share experiences, luteal support recipes, and self-care rituals with other women.
social.newPostPlaceholder: Share a reflection, recipe, or ritual...
social.noPosts: No posts at the moment. Be the first to light up the conversation!

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear, scientific answers about the Nefertiti experience.

questions.question: What makes Nefertiti different from other cycle trackers?
questions.answer: Nefertiti is not just a calendar. It is an integrated female functional medicine platform that connects your biological data with metabolic-based dietary suggestions and a boutique health team, all within a serene, ad-free interface.

questions.question: How are my health and cycle data protected?
questions.answer: Your privacy is non-negotiable. We encrypt all medical information in Cloud Firestore and use bank-level authentication through Firebase. Unlike other apps, we never sell or share your data with third parties.

questions.question: How does synchronization with healthcare professionals work?
questions.answer: If you enable it in your privacy settings, the gynecologists or endocrinologists associated with your account on the platform will be able to view aesthetic reports of your hormonal health for more efficient consultations, avoiding the need to repeatedly report symptoms.

questions.question: Can I use the platform if I have an irregular cycle or use hormonal contraceptives?
questions.answer: Yes. Nefertiti adapts to different biological profiles. For those using hormonal contraceptives, the platform helps focus on integrative nutrition and supporting symptoms related to stress and sleep.

cookies.title: Your Privacy at the Sanctuary
cookies.description: We use cookies to refine your experience, analyze site traffic, and deliver personalized recommendations. Please select your preferences below.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Essential for authentication, security, and basic navigation.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand how the platform is used in a completely anonymous way.
cookies.marketingDesc: Allows us to personalize wellness suggestions and offers according to your interests.

cumplices.title: Cúmplices
cumplices.subtitle: Share your cycle with the one walking beside you to build empathy and complicity.
cumplices.codeValid: Pairing code generated. Expires in 24 hours:
cumplices.explain: When connected, your partner will have an exclusive dashboard focused only on your physiology and cycle phases. He will not have any access to your social area, posts, comments, or private logs.
cumplices.partnerWarning: Restricted Access: Your permissions are limited to essential physiological tracking for cycle empathy.
cumplices.enterCodeDesc: Enter the 6-digit code generated in her app to synchronize the cycle calendar.

br.name: Brazil
br.description: Guarantees full control over sensitive health data. Processing is based on express consent and health protection.
rights: Confirmation and Access to cycle data
Correction of incomplete or inaccurate data
Definitive deletion of personal data (Right to be Forgotten)
Data portability of health data to another platform

eu.name: European Union
eu.description: Strict regulation that treats menstrual health data as a special category (Art. 9). Requires explicit consent and active security.
rights: Right to be Forgotten (Delete account permanently)
Data Portability (Full export in JSON format)
Right to Access and Rectify (View and correct records)
Restrict Processing (Disable telemetry or sharing)

us.name: United States
us.description: In compliance with HIPAA and CCPA principles for electronic medical record protection and non-commercialization of consumer data.
rights: Right to Know & Access (Know what data is collected)
Right to Delete (Delete data on demand)
Strict Non-Sale (Guarantee that records are not sold)
Protected Health Information (PHI) encryption standards

ca.name: Canada
ca.description: Focus on limiting collection, meaningful consent, and advanced technological safeguards for digital health data.
rights: Limiting Collection (Only data necessary for prediction)
Individual Access (Full and immediate access to reports)
Challenging Compliance (Direct legal support channels)
Advanced Safeguards (AES-256 encryption at rest)

jp.name: Japan
jp.law: APPI (Act on the Protection of Personal Information)
jp.description: Specific rules for Information Requiring Special Consideration (medical data). Requires clear approval for sharing with partners.
rights: Restriction of Third-Party Provision (Proibition of sending to third parties)
Suspension of Use (Temporary processing pause)
Disclosure and Correction (Simplified access and rectification)
Anonymized Information handling rules for algorithms

global.name: International / Global
global.description: Applicable to all users in regions without specific local legislation. Combines GDPR best practices and privacy by design.
rights: Absolute Sovereignty over biological data
Bank-grade cryptographic security
Free export and simplified portability
Instant account deletion without bureaucracy
